# The Principality of Aetheria — The Digital Nation

> A digital micronation built around transparent governance, cryptographic
> citizenship, and open protocol infrastructure. Motto: SOVEREIGN BY CODE.
> This site is intentionally agent-friendly: every content page has a
> matching machine-readable JSON file, and shared metrics live in one
> canonical document.

Base URL: https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/

## How to read this site programmatically

- Machine-readable page index: /assets/data/site-index.json
  (every page with title, description, topic cluster, and its JSON data URL)
- Canonical shared metrics (members, protocol version, uptime):
  /assets/data/metrics.json
- Per-page structured content: /assets/data/<page>.json mirrors <page>.html
  (stats, pillars, entries — the HTML renders from these same files)
- Sitemap: /sitemap.xml · Atom feed of bulletins: /feed.xml
- Source repository: https://github.com/DeFi369/digital-nation-website
  (agents contributing code: read AGENTS.md in the repo root first)

## Core documents

- [Charter](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/charter.html): founding operating principles
- [Manifesto](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/manifesto.html): declaration of digital sovereignty
- [Government Structure](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/structure.html): the layered republic (interactive map)
- [About](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/about.html): purpose, history, and model

## Participation

- [Citizenship](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/citizenship.html): rights, duties, onboarding
- [Passport](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/passport.html): the living citizen credential
- [Engage](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/engage.html): petitions, feedback, civic tools
- [Registry](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/registry.html): citizen registry and verification

## Optional

- [Dashboard](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/dashboard.html): participation metrics
- [Protocol Status](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/protocol-status.html): protocol attestation state
- [Research](https://defi369.github.io/digital-nation-website/research.html): research programs and papers
